summary: 10 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum
film.talent: Anya Taylor-Joy (as Seren, a Sindar Elf); Andy Serkis (director)
film.announcement: Anya Taylor-Joy officially joins the cast of the upcoming Rings film as a Woodland Realm elf.

film.title: Untitled January 6 Drama
film.talent: Sean Penn (director), Bradley Cooper (star as Capitol cop)
film.announcement: Sean Penn is set to direct Bradley Cooper in a January 6 friendship drama for Skydance.

film.title: Shatter Me
film.announcement: Warner Bros. acquires the rights to Tahereh Mafi's bestselling dystopian YA series for a film adaptation.

film.title: Narnia: The Magician's Nephew
film.announcement: Netflix teams with Sony Pictures for a global theatrical release of Gerwig's Narnia film.

film.title: Netflix Monsanto Courtroom Drama
film.talent: John Lee Hancock (director), Jonathan Bailey, Laura Dern, LaKeith Stanfield, David Duchovny, Greg Kinnear
film.announcement: Six new cast members added to Hancock's Netflix courtroom drama about the Monsanto trials.

film.title: Egg Baby
film.announcement: Rom-com starring Ariana Greenblatt acquired by Amazon MGM for Prime Video.

film.title: Grace
film.announcement: Crime thriller marks Inevitable Studios' first film, with Simmonds both co-writing and starring.

film.title: Thud
film.talent: Sarah Michelle Gellar, Rudy Pankow (stars); Mali Elfman (director)
film.announcement: Supernatural romance with Gellar and Pankow announced with Elfman directing.

film.title: Black Diamond
film.announcement: Folk horror feature adaptation of the Black Diamond comic with Dickerson directing.

film.title: Gaudí Biopic
film.studio: Onza / Fábrica de Cine / Methos Media
film.announcement: Sound of Freedom director Monteverde sets biopic about architect Antoni Gaudí with three production partners.

tv.title: Only Murders in the Building — Season 6
tv.talent: David Tennant, Nicola Coughlan, Jodie Whittaker, Jim Broadbent (new cast)
tv.announcement: Four major additions announced for Season 6, joining returning stars Steve Martin, Martin Short, and Selena Gomez.

tv.title: Journey
tv.announcement: Original animated fantasy series greenlit at Disney+ from Disney Kids & Family and Higher Ground.

tv.title: Untitled New York Real Estate Drama
tv.announcement: Stephanopoulos and Wentworth are producing a New York real estate drama in development at Hulu.

tv.title: Funny AF With Kevin Hart — Season 2
tv.announcement: Netflix renews Kevin Hart's comedy series for a second season.

tv.title: The Most Wonderful Song of the Year
tv.announcement: Holiday music competition series in development from SNL alumna Ana Gasteyer.

tv.title: Count My Lies
tv.announcement: François Arnaud joins the cast of Hulu's Count My Lies.
